allow: Bash(node -e "const {execSync} = require\(''child_process''\); try { execSync\(''yarn type-check'', {stdio:''pipe''}\); console.log\(''OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.stdout?.toString\(\)\); console.log\(e.stderr?.toString\(\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const cp = require\(''child_process''\); const r = cp.spawnSync\(''node_modules/.bin/tsc'', [''--noEmit''], {encoding:''utf8''}\); console.log\(''STDOUT:'', r.stdout\); console.log\(''STDERR:'', r.stderr\); console.log\(''STATUS:'', r.status\);")

Bash(.gitignore << 'EOF'
# Dependencies
node_modules/

# Build output
dist/
dist-ssr/

coverage/

.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# OS
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Logs
logs/
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*
